targets.rawSql: SELECT name, version, tenant_id, status, risk_tier, approved_by, updated_at FROM model_registry ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT timestamp, actor AS user, payload->'details'->>'session_id' AS session, jsonb_array_elements_text(payload->'details'->'tool_calls') AS tool_used FROM audit_export WHERE payload->'details'->'tool_calls' IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length(payload->'details'->'tool_calls') > 0 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM audit_export WHERE payload->'details'->'tool_calls' IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length(payload->'details'->'tool_calls') > 0

SELECT CASE WHEN tool LIKE '🔍%' THEN 'Web Search' WHEN tool LIKE '🌐%' THEN 'Web Fetch' ELSE 'Other' END AS tool_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(payload->'details'->'tool_calls') AS tool FROM audit_export WHERE payload->'details'->'tool_calls' IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length(payload->'details'->'tool_calls') > 0) t GROUP BY tool_type

SELECT timestamp, actor AS user, event_type, COALESCE(payload->'details'->>'reason', payload->'details'->>'categories', payload->'details'->>'model_id') AS reason, payload->'details'->>'session_id' AS session FROM audit_export WHERE event_type IN ('guard_model_block','output_blocked','model_gate_block') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
